title: Craftable Music Disc
description: This mod works best with JEI Runs on: Neoforge 1.21.1
body:
This mod adds crafting recipes to all 1.21.1 music discs!
Works best with JEI:https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei
If you have any problems send an email to: Squixel10@gmail.com
This mod runs with Neoforge on 1.21.1 as it is the only one I can do currently
